title: ChatGPT Is Getting Its Biggest Upgrade Ever
summary: OpenAI is reportedly transforming ChatGPT from a simple chatbot into a comprehensive AI super app, integrating code generation, agentic capabilities, image tools, third-party integrations, workplace automation, and enhanced security features. The upgrade represents a strategic shift positioning ChatGPT as the central AI layer for work, coding, and daily tasks.
